case_title: VERA PETTWAY VS. TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-12-2014 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PETTWAY, VERA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PETTWAY, VERA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY PETTWAY, VERA AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-12-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-12-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-12-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY TAREN KIM BREWER--PROPERTY MANAGER. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
